cards.front: What does 8 hours typically represent in terms of time?
cards.back: A standard amount of time for a full workday or sleep period

cards.front: What is the typical duration of a workday in many countries?
How many hours is a typical sleep period in many adults?
What is the typical amount of time for a school day in many countries?
What is the typical duration of a standard class period in many educational institutions?
cards.back: 8 hours (some may be shorter, some longer)
